title: Why Luxury Housing Is Booming
text:
Why Luxury Housing Is Booming

Xiaoxi Zhang

Gavekal Dragonomics | 13 Jul 2026

China’s real-estate sector may be in its fifth consecutive year of decline, but one segment of the market is roaring: luxury housing. Sales of the highest-end units in Shanghai were more than 50% higher in May than at the start of the property bust in late 2021, and that’s because the supply-demand dynamics for the luxury segment are fundamentally different from the depressed mass market.Restricted supply has supported prices of luxury units, while the demand from wealthy households has held up because they have fared better than others during the post-pandemic economic weakness. As a result, recent changes in government policy have been more effective in stimulating the luxury market. While the sales gains may cool off some in coming months, the lack of inventory overhang suggests luxury housing can continue to outperform the national market.
